UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PAMELA COATES TAYLOR, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-27-2003 IN DEPT. 218 -SETT CONFERENCE HELD WED, 27AUG2003; MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANTS PAMELA COATES TAYLOR AND JAMES TAYLOR BOTH APPEAR IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DAY; THE CAUSE SETTLES; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD & THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED WRITTEN AGREEMENT AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE SETTLEMENT TERMS CONTAINED IN SAME FOR THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET, #206, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109; DEFENDANTS AGREE TO PAY $600.00 ON OR BEFORE 08SEP2003 TO PLAINTIFF AND SHALL SURRENDER PREMISES ON 22SEP2003 IN A BROOM CLEAN CONDITION; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED; FURNISHINGS IN THE FURNISHED APARTMENT ARE TO BE LEFT IN THE APARTMENT; EACH PARTY SPECIFICALLY WAIVES ANY CLAIM OR CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY; IF DEFENDANTS ARE LATE IN PAYING THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 AFTER THE DATE OF 08SEP2003, PLAINTIFF WILL, AFTER FIVE DAYS FROM 08SEP2003, EXECUTE AN EX-PARTE DECLARATION FOR JUDGMENT TO ISSUE AND WRIT OF POSSESSION WILL ISSUE IN ADDITION TO THE AMOUNT OF ALL UNPAID RENT WILL BE DUE AND OWING BY DEFENDANT(S); IF DEFENDANTS VACATE BY 22SEP2003, ALL UNPAID RENTS ARE FORGIVEN AND PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE; THE SIGNED STIPULATION IN WRITING IS SIGNED BY DEFENDANT PAMELA COATES TAYLOR AND BY DEFENDANT JAMES TAYLOR AND BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL MICHAEL ROSSOFF, IN ADDITION TO MR. NEVEO MOSSER, PROPERTY MANAGER FOR PLAINTIFF; ADDITIONALLY, BOTH DEFENDANTS INFORM THE COURT ON THE RECORD THAT THEY BOTH UNDERSTAND AND AGREE TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SETTLEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER; REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN, CSR; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA (D206/504-A, WED., 27AUG2003).
MINUTES FOR AUG-27-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

ORDER "COURT ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR RELIEF FROM STAY AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT" (301)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PAMELA COATES TAYLOR, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET, #206, SF $1,100.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, SEE SCANNED "UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT"
